shared_negative_prompt: organic alien curves, melted topology, excessive tiny greebles, asymmetrical damage, fantasy, steampunk, exposed character cockpit, smooth toy-like plastic, glowing magical effects, text labels, logos, background scene, landing gear deployed, weapons firing
prompt_rules: Use one faction prompt_prefix plus one role suffix.
Keep ships low-poly or mid-poly with broad planar hard-surface panels.
Prioritize silhouette readability over dense surface detail.
Generate ships in neutral pose with no scene background.
Use triangle output. Stay near recommended_tris for placeholders.

role_suffixes.battleship: massive battleship capital ship, long armored command hull, layered broadside armor, multiple heavy turret mounts, recessed hangar bays, large engine block, strong horizontal silhouette, flat armor planes, 1000 meter class
role_suffixes.cruiser: heavy cruiser warship, balanced capital escort hull, forward command spine, side armor cheeks, visible missile cells and medium turret mounts, large but faster than a battleship, 600 meter class
role_suffixes.destroyer: destroyer warship, aggressive narrow hull, long sensor mast, missile batteries, point defense mounts, fast escort silhouette, sharp prow, 300 meter class
role_suffixes.corvette: corvette patrol warship, compact armored hull, oversized engines, patrol sensors, small turret mounts, agile escort silhouette, 100 meter class
role_suffixes.fighter: single-seat space fighter, compact wedge body, twin engine nacelles, small weapon hardpoints, armored cockpit canopy, sharp angular wings or stabilizer fins, 18 meter class
role_suffixes.bomber: space bomber attack craft, compact heavy strike hull, visible missile racks or torpedo bay, reinforced nose armor, twin or quad engines, less agile than fighter, 32 meter class
role_suffixes.support_craft: military support craft, compact utility hull, docking collar, sensor pods, repair arms or cargo clamps, lightly armored, visible maneuver thrusters, 35 meter class
role_suffixes.small_trader: small trader freighter, compact cargo hull, visible container bay, single main engine block, practical cockpit, lightly armored, 50 meter class
role_suffixes.large_trader: large commercial freighter, long cargo spine, stacked container modules, tug-like command module, large engine cluster, minimal weapons, 150 to 220 meter class
role_suffixes.gas_hauler: gas hauler tanker spacecraft, multiple large cylindrical pressure tanks, reinforced central spine, hazard bands, industrial piping, tug command module, 220 meter class
role_suffixes.miner: mining spacecraft, rugged industrial hull, ore bins, drill arms or cutting booms, exposed machinery, heavy landing clamps, work lights, 180 meter class
role_suffixes.passenger_liner: passenger liner spacecraft, elongated habitable modules, observation windows as dark inset strips, smooth but still planar hull panels, safety markings, large but non-military silhouette, 120 meter class
role_suffixes.pirate_raider: fast pirate raider, converted small freighter hull, welded front armor, exposed guns, oversized engines, asymmetric side pods, patched metal, 25 to 70 meter class
role_suffixes.pirate_frigate: pirate frigate, converted industrial or escort hull, improvised broadside guns, welded armor belts, mismatched engine modules, salvage equipment, threatening but human-built silhouette, 180 meter class
